title: 'kpod login' doesn't allow certificates to be in non-default directory

comments.body:
If we agree to do this, I can work on this.
@rhatdan PTAL
I would like to see this be a fail over case /etc/containers/certs.d, /etc/docker/certs.d and then override-able by the kpod login command.

Should this be something specified in the /etc/containers/registries.conf file?
@baude WDYT?
@rhatdan will be fixed once #303 is in.
